chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7772 of 2018 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case 1. For hearing of CMA No.34002/2018 2. For hearing of main case 13-05-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for respondent Mr. Parvez Ahmed Memon, advocate for the respondent Ms. Nuzhat Shah, advocate for respondent No.5. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General along with Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Petition is pending since 2018 without any progress. Petitioner remains unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
